videos.title: কাঁচের ওপারে | Beyond the Glass | Bengali Indie Rock Song | Ghost Composer
videos.description:
কাঁচের ওপারে (Beyond the Glass) is a dark Bengali indie rock song about invisible love, silent longing and emotional distance that can never be crossed.

The song explores the feeling of loving someone who lives in the same world but behind an invisible glass wall — close enough to see, yet impossible to reach.

Driven by haunting synth textures, industrial rock energy and melancholic storytelling

videos.description:
Welcome to Hridoyells.
This is my cover of “Ondho Deyal” by Sonar Bangla Circus — one of the most emotional and powerful Bengali alternative songs ever made.
I tried to keep the raw feeling and emotion alive while adding my own touch through vocals and instrumentation. If you enjoy Bengali indie music, acoustic covers, and emotional Bangla songs, this cover is for you.

videos.title: REALITY CHECK - DRUVV (KANNADA SONG)
videos.description:
“REALITY CHECK” by Druvv is not just a rap song—it’s a raw reflection of the world we live in. This track hits hard with truth, exposing how money, power, and fake loyalty control people and break real connections. With gritty beats and unapologetic lyrics, Druvv delivers a message straight from the streets—no filters, no sugarcoating.

This song is for anyone who’s seen the dark side of success,
